full_text:
TLS project meeting

22.11.2024

Agenda

1.Tuulia Bruno’s Talk summary (10 min)
Share your thoughts and key takeaways from the talk.
2. Ada’s Results (15 min)
IDS Profiling: Results summary (Tumor %, HRD/HRP status) + how many samples belong to iCan?
Discussion on which kind of samples to profile based on this information
tCycIF panel considerations: Lead discussion on SPACE-like panel effectiveness, gather opinions on the extra cycle consideration.
Coordination updates:
24-tube tray order update.
Lina’s lab time for proteo-picks (potential 2-3 month contract extension). @Lina Maltrovsky will join for this part of the meeting
3. Zhihan’s Results (20 min)
EyeMT Annotations & Pair Review:
GeoMx Planning:
Re-utilizable info from the First/Second Batch of EyeMT: number of potential CD4/CD8 aggregate samples for further analysis (Omentum).
Summary of EyeMT GeoMx experiment (slides, ROIs):
Third Batch: Suitability for Jan experiments (TLS presence, Omentum tissue, Tumor %).
Lead discussion on how many samples to share and how many more samples/ROI/AOIs to include?
Morphology Marker Panel: Agree on sample scale and experimental design.
4. Master’s Thesis & Student Recruitment (5 min)
Progress update + any criteria or alignment changes for student projects?
5. Next Steps (15 min)
Update GANTT diagram, set new goals, and divide tasks for the next meeting.

Tuulia Bruno’s talk summary

PNAd (Peripheral Node Addressin)

2. Ada’s results from IDS profiling (I): Tumor % effect on GC

I annotated all omentum IDS samples and explored the GC and IAgg presence across three tumor % categories

Low: <10%
Med: 10-40%
High: >40%

2. Ada’s results from IDS profiling (I): Tumor % effect on GC

Low: <10%
Med: 10-40%
High: >40%

Low % Tumor samples also display GCs

List of iCAN GC-containing samples

Done or planned to be done in EyeMT

2. Ada’s results from IDS profiling (II): HRD status

Uncertainty on HRD-status - 
We lack clinical data (~9/15)
3 samples with ovaHRDscar=0

Considering HRDscar=0 as HRP

Dropping HRDscar=0

2. Updates on coordination

3. Zhihan: EyeMT Annotations & Pair Review

By Aleksandra & Ada

3. Zhihan: GeoMx Planning

Batch 2 (2024): 14 samples, 10 ROIs / ~15 AOIs per sample, 2 pairs of pre/post samples included

Batch 1 (2023): 16 samples, 10 ROIs / 20 AOIs per sample, 5 pairs of pre/post samples listed

Batch 3 (2025): 27 samples(-4?, +4, +3, =30), 10 ROIs / 20 AOIs? per sample, 6 pairs of pre/post samples enrolled

3. Zhihan: GeoMx Planning

By Aleksandra

3. Zhihan: GeoMx Planning

3. Zhihan: GeoMx Planning

Morphology Marker Panel

One possible CD20 marker in channel AF594 (Texas Red) in geomx validated/tested morphology markers’ list: CD20, Clone: IGEL/773, AF594, Novus, NBP2-47840AF594
but in Tuulia’s paper they used CD20 - Spark NIR685 BioLegend 302366 (in Cy5)

Key discuss points:
Sample scale?
ROI selection criteria? 1 ROI = 1 AOI?
Utilizing proteomics data: same micro-area for picking/ROIs selection
Experimental design & Calculations
Reagents / Buffers ordering in advance
And also - tCycIF panels?

4. Master’s Thesis & Student Recruitment

Progress update + any criteria or alignment changes for student projects?

5. Next steps

Update GANTT diagram, set new goals, and divide tasks for the next meeting
